```{r}
library(tidyverse);
library(rethinking)
```


```{r}
# 35 ages
# Women Time period = 1
age <- seq(15, 49, by = 1)
distance <- -abs(age - mean(age))/sd(age)
dprob  <- inv_logit(distance)

d <- data.frame(
    ages = rep(seq(15, 49), each = 1000)
) |> mutate(
    ages_std = (ages - mean(ages))/sd(ages),
    birthed = rbinom(length(ages), size = 1, prob = inv_logit(-1 + 1.5 * ages_std))
)
    

d |> group_by(ages) |> summarize(mean(birthed)) |> print(n = 50)
plot(age, inv_logit(-1 + 1.5 * standardize(age)), type = "l")

```

```{r}
d$age_at_fc <- ifelse(d$birthed == 0, NA, sapply(d$ages,  function(x) {
    if(x == 15) {
        return(x)
    } else {
        return(
            sample(age[age <= x], size = 1, replace = FALSE, prob = dprob[1:(x-15+1)])
        )
    }
}))

table(d$age_at_fc)

```


Diagnostics
```{r}
sample(age[age < 17], 1, TRUE, dprob[1:(17-15)])
aggregate(fc, by = list(ages), FUN = mean)
```
